description: Employees submit expense claims for reimbursement. Currently they email receipts to finance, who manually track approvals and payments in Excel.
current_process: Employee emails receipts and expense details to finance.
Finance records the expense in an Excel spreadsheet.
If the amount exceeds £250 the employee's manager must approve.
Finance follows up by email if information is missing.
Once approved the expense is marked ready for payment.
desired_process: Employee submits expenses through a structured form and uploads receipts.
A central record is automatically created.
Manager approval is required for expenses above £250.
Finance validates the expense before marking it ready for reimbursement.
The employee receives confirmation and status updates.
notifications_required: Notification when expense is approved or rejected
